_comment: Anamnesis — self-organizing memory proxy. Works with any OpenAI-compatible backend.

_presets._note: Swap baseUrl + apiKey for your backend:

custom-passthrough._note: Empty apiKey lets the client's own Authorization header pass through to upstream unchanged.

upstream._disableThinkingNote: Injects chat_template_kwargs:{enable_thinking:false} — prevents Qwen3 thinking tokens from eating context/time

_modelGuide.gemma3:1b: 0.8GB — fastest, good enough for simple fact extraction
_modelGuide.qwen2.5:0.5b: 0.4GB — smallest, use if VRAM is tight
_modelGuide.qwen3:0.6b: 0.5GB — fast, clean JSON via /api/chat think:false, ~140 t/s

foresight._note: Future-intention extractor. Runs in parallel with memcell extraction.

persona._note: Character profile management — auto-detects OpenClaw SOUL.md, or use file/inline for other setups.

source._typeNote: auto | openclaw | file | inline. 'auto' tries openclaw paths, then file, then inline.

openclaw._note: Path to SOUL.md. Used in 'openclaw' mode and as the first candidate in 'auto' mode.

file._note: Custom character definition file for non-OpenClaw setups.

inline._note: Paste character definition directly here if not using a file.

drift._checkNote: Run a drift check every N assistant turns per session.
drift._thresholdNote: Consistency score below this triggers a drift reminder. 0=always remind, 1=never.

evolution._consolidateNote: After this many pending growth observations, run LLM consolidation.

injection._note: Max characters for the <character> block (not counting evolution/drift lines).
